description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named CI Upstream that runs on pushes to main, on pull requests to main with specific labels, and on manual dispatch. The workflow should run in an ubuntu-latest environment with a bash shell, using a matrix strategy for Python 3.12. It checks out the repository, sets up a conda environment with micromamba, installs cf_xarray, runs tests with pytest, and conditionally generates and publishes a report on failure during scheduled runs.
